hook: It promised to keep your secrets. Then it didn't.
vo: In 2023, the US FTC ordered BetterHelp to pay $7.8 million.
The reason: sharing users' sensitive mental-health data with Facebook and others for advertising.
That data came from people asking for help.
onscreen_text: It promised to keep your secrets.
cta: Trust is the product. We don't sell your data.
broll_notes: Close-up of a phone screen showing a therapy app login, then a slow zoom out to reveal social media ad tiles — no faces, no presenter. Muted, cold colour grade throughout.
